description: arXiv:2607.17342v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Understanding physical human-robot and human-human interactions is a challenging yet emerging topic in 3D vision. While most existing methods rely on skeleton sequences--effective in low-light and privacy-sensitive environment--they face two major challenges: 1) learning and effectively exploiting interaction cues from skeletal data, and 2) comp...
author: Yuhang Wen, Mengyuan Liu, Zixuan Tang, Junsong Yuan, Sirui Li, Beichen Ding
